content:
OfficerID: gessinod, Narrative
Title: Ethnic Intimidation / Menacing (NS)
Sir,
On 4-5-18, while assigned to z/c 1A23 (Gessino 341 / DeJesus 1881), we received a Code 1 radio broadcast at 1518 hours to respond to 14120 Lorain in c/w a female subjected to racial slurs at a convenience store (Ann's Beverage) by a store clerk.
Upon arrival at 1522 hours we conferred with the victim (Nicole Boyd / DOB 9-6-82 / 216-413-2386) who was waiting for us in her car in the store parking lot. She stated that she was threatened with physical violence as well as subjected to racial slurs by a store clerk as she attempted to purchase a pack ofcigarettes. The suspect (Raj Singh / DOB 7-19-87 / 216-410-9038) asked her for ID when she asked for the cigarettes, and then, according to Ms. Boyd, he "went offon me" and called her a "nigger bitch" before he exited the clerk's enclosure to confront her. At that time he said "I'mgonna kick your ass ifyou don't get the fuck out" as he approached her in what she perceived as a threatening manner. Ms. Boyd exited the store and called CPD.
According to Mr. Singh, he asked Ms. Boyd for ID at which time she said she didn't have it, and that she shouldn't need it to buy cigarettes. He stated she started yelling at himsaying things like "why can't you speak English" and other similar remarks. He admitted to calling her a "bitch" but denied using the "n" word. He said he also told her to "get the fuck out of the store" when she refused to leave after he told her he was going to refuse her service. When I asked ifhe threatened her with physical violence he stated that he did not, but did admit to leaving the clerk's enclosure to put a bottle away while Ms. Boyd was still in the store. He said he did not approach her in a threatening manner but just told her again to exit the store.
We asked Mr. Singh ifwe could view the in store security footage to which he replied that he would need to contact his manager. The manager said he was unable to come to the store to view the footage. Mr. Singh was advised to save the footage as it may be needed for review.
Ms. Boyd was agitated with me stating that we were not taking the situation seriously, to which I advised her that I was indeed taking the situation very seriously by reviewing the suspect's statements, getting in contact with the store manager in c/w the video footage, and also conferring with my sector Sergeant in regards to the incident and howmost effectively to proceed. I advised her that a member of our Detective Bureau would be getting in touch with her, and I provided her with the incident number, our names, zone car, and D-1 contact information.
I conferred with 1S23 Sgt Jackson 9952 via land line.
Page: 6 of 6
You created this PDF from an application that is not licensed to print to novaPDF printer (http://www.novapdf.com)
